name: Mary Randolph's Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter in a mixing bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
3. Incorporate the mashed sweet potatoes into the mixture and beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until thoroughly combined.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. In a small pan, heat the brandy just until warm.
6. Pour the warmed brandy into the sweet potato mixture along with lemon rind, lemon juice, vanilla extract, and ground nutmeg. Stir until all ingredients are well blended.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Sprinkle the pie with finely chopped citron.
10. Allow the pie to cool immediately.
